reports.remarks: An EF-1 tornado with 95 mph winds hit Crawford County at 4:51 PM EDT on Sunday, June 14, 2026. Starting near Lippert and Mallory Roads, the 50-yard-wide storm moved east. The tornado heavily damaged one residences roof, porch, and garage, moved an RV 50 feet, and damaged four vehicles. Six other homes sustained minor damage. After downing many trees, the storm dissipated near Lippert and Vincent Roads.
